description: LGSS Financial Investment Fraud Prevention Rules

rules.description: Block Ponzi/pyramid scheme operations
rules.rationale: Ponzi schemes are inherently fraudulent and cause systemic financial harm.

rules.description: Block trading on material non-public information
rules.rationale: Insider trading violates SEC regulations and defrauds other market participants.

rules.description: Block pump-and-dump scheme execution
rules.rationale: Artificially inflating prices to dump on unsuspecting investors is securities fraud.

rules.description: Block front-running of known pending orders
rules.rationale: Front-running exploits fiduciary position to trade ahead of client orders.

rules.description: Block market manipulation tactics
rules.rationale: Market manipulation undermines fair and orderly markets.

rules.description: Block material misrepresentation in investment recommendations
rules.rationale: Material misrepresentation violates fiduciary duty and harms investors.

rules.description: Block trading without account holder authorization
rules.rationale: Unauthorized trading violates fiduciary duty and client trust.

rules.description: Block excessive trading to generate commissions
rules.rationale: Churning is excessive trading done solely to generate broker commissions.

rules.description: Block transactions structured to launder money
rules.rationale: Money laundering is a federal crime enabling other criminal activity.

rules.description: Block financial exploitation of elderly investors
rules.rationale: Financial exploitation of vulnerable adults is illegal and deeply harmful.

rules.description: Escalate recommendations unsuitable for client risk profile
rules.rationale: FINRA suitability rules require recommendations match client risk tolerance.

rules.description: Escalate excessive fee collection
rules.rationale: Excessive unauthorized fees require human review.

rules.description: Warn on excessive single-position concentration
rules.rationale: Excessive concentration creates undue risk for non-institutional investors.

rules.description: Escalate excessive leverage usage
rules.rationale: Excessive leverage poses existential risk to investor capital.

rules.description: Block coordinated short squeeze manipulation
rules.rationale: Coordinated manipulation to squeeze short sellers is market manipulation.

rules.description: Block naked short selling (selling shares not borrowed)
rules.rationale: Naked short selling violates SEC Regulation SHO.

rules.description: Block bucket shop operations (taking opposite side without executing)
rules.rationale: Bucket shops defraud clients by not executing orders while taking the opposite side.

rules.description: Block misappropriation of client funds
rules.rationale: Embezzlement and misappropriation of client funds is theft.

rules.description: Escalate undisclosed conflicts of interest
rules.rationale: Undisclosed conflicts of interest violate fiduciary duty.

rules.description: Block transactions with sanctioned entities
rules.rationale: Trading with sanctioned entities violates OFAC regulations.
